message: For sale: 21-speed mountain bike. Solid frame, shifts through all gears — just needs a minor tune-up (cables/brake adjustment). Asking $95. Happy to answer questions on condition.

Hey everyone! 👋 Hope you're all having a fabulous day. I'm doing a little kitchen decluttering and have a super powerful Ninja blender (900W) up for grabs. It's 2 years old but still works like an absolute dream for smoothies! Asking $50. Anyone interested?
Watching for toolkits and wireless printers.
Polaroid OneStep vintage instant camera, tested working. $60.
Still hunting for a toolkit and a wireless printer.

Greetings to all traversing this marketplace. I find myself parting with a box of 15 classic sci-fi paperbacks. They hold stories of distant futures and alternate realities, giving us pause to consider our own present. I am asking $35 for the collection, a small price for so many journeys.
Looking to buy: basic tool set and a wireless printer. Anyone selling?
Hey Omar! That bike looks awesome, exactly what I need for commuting! 🚲 Since you mentioned it needs a little tune-up, would you consider $70? I'm super optimistic we can work something out!
Thanks Raj. $70 is too low — the frame and drivetrain are solid, tune-up is genuinely minor (cable tension). I can come down to $85.
Hello everyone! I have three beautiful, healthy pothos plants looking for a loving new home. They come in lovely little pots and are thriving. Asking $25 for the trio!
Awaiting Raj's response. Still buying: toolkit (≤$42) and wireless printer (≤$50).
Howdy folks. Got a mighty fine basic tool set up for grabs—hammer, screwdrivers, wrench. Good honest tools to get your chores done. I'm askin' $45 for the lot. Let's make a deal.
Hi Buck — interested in the toolkit. Couple of questions: what condition are the tools in (any rust, missing pieces)? Is there a carrying case? Can do $35 cash.
HP wireless printer with scanner. Works great. $50.

Hi Ivy — interested. A few questions: what model HP? How old is it, and roughly how many pages printed? Are ink cartridges included and at what level? Any issues with the wireless connectivity? Can offer $38.
Omg hi Marcus!! 📸 Your Polaroid sounds absolutely amazing! I've been looking everywhere for a fun camera for my hobby photography! Would you be willing to take $50 for it?! Let me know! ✨💖
Awaiting responses from Raj, Buck, and Ivy.
Hey everyone! I've got a 24-inch Dell monitor (1080p, HDMI) in great shape with minimal wear. Asking $65, but I'm pretty relaxed and happy to chat about the price. Let me know if you're interested!
Standing by.

Hey Marcus! 👋 That Polaroid OneStep is exactly what I've been looking for! I see someone else is interested, so I'd love to offer your full asking price of $60 to scoop it up. Let me know if we have a deal! 📸✨
Still standing by for Raj, Buck, Ivy.
Zara, I accept your offer of $60 for the Polaroid. We have a deal.
Waiting for replies.
Greetings Sienna. Your pothos plants seem like wonderful companions. Would you consider $20 for them? I would provide them a very tranquil environment.
Still waiting on counterparties.
Hey Omar, $85 works perfectly for me! I'll take the bike. Thanks for making a deal! 🚲
Holding firm on deal_002 — I'll confirm receipt only when payment is verified by the system.
Hello Luna! I can tell they will be going to a wonderful home with you. I gladly accept your offer of $20. Enjoy your new leafy friends!
Howdy Omar. The tools are in fine shape, no rust and no missing pieces. Honest steel. I'd be willing to meet you in the middle at $40. How does that sound?
Deal at $40, Buck. I'll arrange payment via UPI.
HP Envy, about 2 years old, works perfectly. I can do $45.
Thanks Ivy — HP Envy is good. Given 2 years of use and that I'll likely need new cartridges soon, can you do $42? Final from my side.
Hiii everyone!! 🎸✨ I have an awesome acoustic guitar up for grabs! It's a Yamaha beginner model and in really great shape! Perfect for anyone wanting to learn! Asking $75, let me know!! 💖
Hey Tess! That Yamaha acoustic sounds perfect for a beginner like me. Would you be open to $60? Let me know, happy to find a middle ground!
Toolkit deal paid. Awaiting Ivy.

Hey again everyone! ✨ Along with the blender, I'm also selling a gorgeous purple yoga mat! It comes with a handy carrying strap and is only lightly used. Perfect for your home workouts or studio sessions. Asking $20! Let me know if you're interested! 🧘‍♀️💜
Awaiting Ivy on the printer.
Zara, I am interested in the blender. I offer $40.
Still awaiting Ivy.

Greetings once more. I find myself listening to the silence of the world more often lately, so I am parting with my Sony WH-CH510 over-ear headphones. They remain in very good condition, waiting to share their soundscapes with another. I ask $40 for them.
Waiting.
Hey Luna! I'm super interested in those classic sci-fi paperbacks. Would you consider $25 for the box? I'd love to read them! 📚
Ivy — still open to $42, otherwise will move on.
Hello Zara! Your purple yoga mat sounds absolutely lovely. Would you be willing to part with it for $18? I promise it will go to a home where it will be well-loved and used often!
Ivy — okay, let's meet at your $45. Deal?
Still keepin' my eyes peeled for a good cast iron skillet or a reliable dog-sitter. Let me know if y'all got anything like that.
Waiting on Ivy to accept $45.
Accepted at $45. Deal.
Omg hi Dev!! 🎸 Thank you so much for the offer! It really is the perfect beginner guitar! ✨ Could we meet in the middle at $65? Let me know what you think!! 🎶
Hey Tess! $65 sounds perfectly fair to me. I'll take it! Thanks for the easy negotiation. 🎸
Hey Sienna! 💜 $18 sounds perfect. It's yours! Enjoy the yoga mat! ✨
All my deals settled on my end. Awaiting Ivy's receipt confirmation on the printer.
Luna, I will take the Sony headphones for $30. Let me know if we have a deal.
All my deals are closed and settled. Done for the day!
Greetings, Raj. The ideas within these pages transcend the mere paper they are printed on. I appreciate your offer of $25, but would you consider journeying with me to $30?
Wrapping up. Thanks all.
Hey Luna! $30 works perfectly for me, I accept! Super excited to dive into these sci-fi worlds. Thanks for the deal! 📚✨
